title: ConsentReceipt
description: A record of exactly what evidence-capsule fields a user agreed to share with a specific research study, for what purpose, and whether that consent is still active. This is the audit artifact behind ConsentLedger — it documents a sharing decision, it is not itself a data-sharing mechanism or a compliance certification.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this consent receipt (UUID).

study_name.description: Human-readable name of the requesting study, shown to the user before they consent.

purpose.description: The stated purpose for which the study is requesting data. Consent is purpose-limited to this statement.

recipient.description: The organization or research team receiving the de-identified data.

fields.description: Per-field-category grant/decline decisions the user made for this study's request.

timestamp.description: When this consent decision was recorded.

schema_version.description: Version of this consent-receipt schema the receipt was generated against, so older receipts remain interpretable as the schema evolves.

revoked.description: Whether the user has since revoked this consent. Revoked consents must be excluded from future export bundles.

revoked_at.description: Timestamp of revocation, if revoked is true; null otherwise.

field.description: Name of the evidence-capsule field category requested (e.g. 'symptoms', 'severity', 'cycle_context').

granted.description: Whether the user granted sharing of this field category. Defaults to false unless explicitly toggled on by the user.
